title: Pleasant Color Experience
insight: When I color my hair, I want to enjoy the experience, but the strong chemical smell makes it unpleasant.
benefit: Enjoy a more pleasant coloring experience with reduced chemical odor.
rtb: Odor-binding molecules capture ammonia before it reaches your senses.

title: Damage-Free Bleach
insight: I want lighter hair, but I am afraid of damaging it.
benefit: Achieve powerful lightening without damaging your hair.
rtb: Advanced bond-building technology protects the hair structure.

title: One-Step Wonder
insight: I do a long hair routine because I want healthy-looking hair, but I rarely have time for all the steps.
benefit: Get the results of a full routine in a single step.
rtb: A multi-active complex delivers cleansing, repair and shine at once.

title: Calm Scalp Ritual
insight: I want my scalp to feel calm because stress shows up there too, but most products feel clinical and cold.
benefit: Turn scalp care into a calming moment that soothes and resets.
rtb: A cooling botanical blend relaxes the scalp on contact.
tagline: A calmer scalp, a calmer you.

title: Reads Your Hair
insight: I want products that suit my hair, but my hair changes with seasons and styling and generic products never keep up.
benefit: A routine that adapts to your hair as it changes.
rtb: An adaptive diagnostic reads your hair and adjusts the formula to match.

title: Beauty That Starts Within
insight: I do everything to my hair from the outside because I want it strong, but I never think about supporting it from within.
benefit: Support stronger hair from the inside, where growth begins.
rtb: Keratin-precursor nutrients feed the follicle at the root.
